chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI JCM NO. 21 of 2011 _____________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge For orders on Main Petition. 06.05.2026. None present ------ None is present on behalf of the parties, nor has any intimation been received. This matter has been pending for over 15 years without any significant progress. None of the parties have appeared to pursue the matter with any diligence. Accordingly, the instant JCM is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Ayaz
